$comment: Seed catalog so Holo Player is ALREADY FULL on first open — no TMDb key, offline. Real popular titles with accurate TMDb ids + metadata (genres/year/rating/overview). Each carries a verified imdb_id so the normalizer fills real, beautiful poster/backdrop art KEY-FREE via the Stremio metahub CDN (the same source Cinemeta uses); a configured TMDb key still live-upgrades to TMDb's own art/trailers. Each item is TMDb-shaped (media_type=movie|tv, genre_ids) so holo-media-item normalizers consume it exactly like a live TMDb row.

items.title: Inception
items.overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into a CEO's mind.

items.title: Interstellar
items.overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

items.title: The Matrix
items.overview: A computer hacker learns the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

items.title: The Dark Knight
items.overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime as he faces the Joker, who plunges Gotham into anarchy.

items.title: Pulp Fiction
items.overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and others intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

items.title: Forrest Gump
items.overview: A man with a low IQ recounts the extraordinary events of his life as they shape American history.

items.title: The Avengers
items.overview: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together to stop Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

items.title: Avatar
items.overview: A paraplegic Marine on the moon Pandora is torn between following orders and protecting an alien world.

items.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
items.overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam.

items.title: Titanic
items.overview: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a poor artist aboard the ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.

items.title: Parasite
items.overview: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household by infiltrating it one by one.

items.title: Your Name.
items.overview: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way: when they sleep, they swap bodies.

items.title: GoodFellas
items.overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his family and partners.

items.title: Dune
items.overview: Paul Atreides arrives on the dangerous desert planet Arrakis to ensure the future of his family and people.

items.name: Breaking Bad
items.overview: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with cancer turns to manufacturing meth to secure his family's future.

items.name: Game of Thrones
items.overview: Noble families vie for control of the Iron Throne as an ancient enemy returns after millennia.

items.name: Stranger Things
items.overview: When a boy vanishes, a town uncovers a mystery of secret experiments, supernatural forces and a strange girl.

items.name: The Sopranos
items.overview: A New Jersey mob boss balances the demands of his crime family with those of his real one.

items.name: Rick and Morty
items.overview: An alcoholic scientist drags his grandson on absurd, dangerous adventures across the multiverse.

items.name: Arcane
items.overview: Amid the unrest of two twin cities, two sisters fight on rival sides of a war between magic and technology.

items.name: Friends
items.overview: Six twenty-something friends navigate life and love in New York City.

items.name: Attack on Titan
items.overview: After his hometown is destroyed, a young man vows to wipe out the giant Titans that devour humanity.

items.name: The Mandalorian
items.overview: A lone bounty hunter travels the outer reaches of the galaxy, far from the authority of the New Republic.

items.name: The Queen's Gambit
items.overview: Orphaned at nine, a chess prodigy rises to the top of the game while battling addiction.

items.$comment: These four exist in the open/CC catalog (feed/catalog.json) — the availability resolver binds them to that source so they become truly PLAYABLE through Holo Video, demonstrating discovery→play. Their TMDb ids enrich them live when a key is set; art comes from the bound catalog source.
items.title: Sintel
items.overview: A lone warrior crosses a harsh world to find the dragon she once raised — a Blender open movie.

items.title: Tears of Steel
items.overview: A group fights to save the world from destructive robots in a ruined near-future Amsterdam.

items.title: Elephants Dream
items.overview: Two men wander a vast, shifting machine — the first Blender open movie.

items.title: Big Buck Bunny
items.overview: A gentle giant rabbit turns the tables on three bullying rodents.
